word: G5101 - τίς - tís - tis - Every man

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τίς

- Transliteration: Tis

- Phonetic: tis

- Definition:

1. who, which, what

- Origin: probably emphat. of G5100

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Probably emphatic of G5100; an interrogitive pronoun who which or what (in direct or indirect questions): - every man how (much) + no (-ne thing) what (manner thing) where ([-by -fore -of -unto -with -withal]) whether which who (-m -se) why.
